manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to describe a target word for another player to guess.

Rules:
(a) You have to reply in the form: CLUE: <some text>. Guesses from the other player will start with GUESS.
(b) You cannot use the target word itself, parts or morphological variants of it in your description.
(c) In addition, the same rules apply for related words which are provided below.

End conditions:
(i) If you use the target word or a related word in your description, then you lose.
(ii) If the other player can guess the target word in 3 tries, you both win.

Let us start.

This is the target word that you need to describe and that the other player needs to guess:

surprise

Related words are:

- party
- shock
- unexpected

Important: You are under time pressure, give short descriptions that are to the point!

content.thinking:
I need to describe "surprise" without using:
- surprise (the target word)
- party
- shock
- unexpected

I should think of what a surprise is... it's something that happens suddenly without warning, catches you off guard, makes you go "oh!" or "wow!"

Short clues I could give:
- "A sudden event you didn't see coming"
- "The feeling when something happens without warning"
- "When something catches you off guard"
- "A birthday ___" (no, too obvious and close to party)

Let me try: "The feeling when something happens that you didn't anticipate"

Wait, I need to be more concise and direct.

"Something revealed suddenly that you didn't know was coming"

content.text: CLUE: A sudden event or revelation that catches someone off guard because they didn't anticipate it

clem_player.response: CLUE: A sudden event or revelation that catches someone off guard because they didn't anticipate it

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to guess a target word that another player describes to you.

You can make one guess at each trial. You win when you guess the target word. You lose when you cannot guess it in 3 tries.

After each trial you will get a new hint from the other player which starts with CLUE.

Make your guesses by just saying the word using the following form: GUESS: <a word>

Let us start.


CLUE: A sudden event or revelation that catches someone off guard because they didn't anticipate it

content.thinking:
The clue describes "A sudden event or revelation that catches someone off guard because they didn't anticipate it."

This sounds like it could be:
- SURPRISE - something unexpected that catches someone off guard
- SHOCK - a sudden unexpected event
- REVELATION - something revealed unexpectedly
- BOMBSHELL - an unexpected revelation

The most common word that fits this description would be "SURPRISE" - it perfectly captures the idea of something catching someone off guard because they didn't anticipate it.

Let me go with SURPRISE as my first guess.
